name: Police Management
description: Comprehensive police department management — manage cases, track officers, log incidents, and generate reports with evidence tracking and case workflows.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchCases
capabilities.description: Search for cases by number, type, status, or officer

capabilities.name: createIncident
capabilities.description: Log a new incident report with details and location

capabilities.name: getOfficer
capabilities.description: Get officer profile with assigned cases and schedule

capabilities.name: updateCase
capabilities.description: Update case status, assign officers, or add notes

capabilities.name: getCase
capabilities.description: Get case details with timeline, evidence, and officers

capabilities.name: searchIncidents
capabilities.description: Search incidents by date, type, location, or status

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read police data including cases, officers, and incidents

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update cases, officers, incidents, and reports

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete cases, incident records, and reports

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full police administration including case assignment and access control
